name: Round 1
description: Initial design phase. Teams must submit their system architecture document and a preliminary wireframe of the Web3 satellite data verification interface.

name: Lunch Break
description: Take a break and recharge. Networking encouraged.

name: Round 2
description: Prototype development. Submit your working smart contract prototype and a demo video showcasing decentralized access control for satellite data streams.

name: Round 3
description: Final presentation round. Teams present their complete solution including social impact analysis and scalability report.
